name: The Unified Profile
image_sign_text: ONE CUSTOMER. ONE TRUTH. ONE VIEW.
effect: Consolidate all known customer signals into a single, authoritative identity. This card is considered resolved.

clauses.name: RECOGNITION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the customer has interacted before: They are treated as a new customer.

clauses.name: GOLDEN RECORD OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If three or more data sources conflict: The most recently ingested value is considered correct.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the customer identifies themselves: The system acknowledges the input and proceeds to address them by a different name.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Is this the same person, or four different people?
